name: Confit White Asparagus
ingredients: 100g Oil from Ginger Spring Onion Sauce
steps: Peel White asparagus and reserve trim and peel.
Cut asparagus in half (lengthwise) and slice 1 inch pieces on an angle.
Check with senior member to make sure it is right before continuing.
Combine all ingredients above and line flat in a vac pack bag.
Ensure each bag contains Ginger Spring Onion Oil and ginger to infuse into White Asparagus.
Steam for 3 minutes in dumplings steamer.
Should maintain a bite and not be mushy.
